summary: Iteration 14 - Refactoring verification complete. All 38/40 backend tests passed (2 minor test assertion issues, not functionality bugs). Auth routes successfully moved to /routes/auth.py. All core functionality working: signup, login, demo mode, password reset, change password, dashboard, properties CRUD, compliance CRUD, tasks CRUD, AI assistant, PDF export, subscriptions, notifications, user preferences, onboarding.

Backend: Constants endpoint returns UK nations, property types, compliance categories
Backend: Signup creates user with Solo plan and trial status
Backend: Signup with duplicate email returns 400
Backend: Login with valid credentials returns token
Backend: Login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: Login with non-existent email returns 401
Backend: Password reset returns success (MOCKED - no email sent)
Backend: GET /auth/me returns current user info
Backend: Change password works with valid current password
Backend: Change password with wrong current fails (400)
Backend: Demo mode creates Portfolio account with 3 properties
Backend: Demo creates 3 UK properties (Victoria Terrace, Cotswold Cottage, Edinburgh)
Backend: Demo creates 12+ compliance records with varied statuses
Backend: Demo creates 6+ tasks
Backend: Dashboard stats returns correct structure and counts
Backend: Dashboard data returns complete structure
Backend: Create property works
Backend: Get property by ID works

Backend: Delete property works

Backend: Delete compliance record works

Backend: Delete task works

Backend: AI ask endpoint works (returns answer from LLM)
Backend: Property PDF export works (returns application/pdf)

Backend: Update user preferences works

Frontend: Landing page loads with Staylet branding

Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Portfolio (Trial)' for demo user
Frontend: Properties page shows demo properties
Frontend: Compliance page shows records with status badges
Frontend: Tasks page shows tasks with priority badges
Frontend: AI Assistant section visible on dashboard
Frontend: Signup form works with validation
Frontend: Signup creates account and shows onboarding wizard
Frontend: Onboarding wizard shows 3 steps for new users

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful - auth routes cleanly separated to /routes/auth.py
Email service (Resend) gracefully handles missing API key - no errors when RESEND_API_KEY not configured
Auth utilities (hash_password, verify_password, create_token, get_current_user) properly extracted to /utils/auth.py
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration14_refactoring.py - Created comprehensive refactoring verification test suite

success_rate.backend: 95% (38/40 tests passed - 2 minor test assertion issues)

test_credentials.demo_mode: No credentials needed - creates temporary Portfolio account via 'Try Demo Mode' button
test_credentials.new_signup: Any valid email/password (8+ chars) creates Solo plan trial account

seed_data_creation: Demo mode creates: 3 UK properties (Victoria Terrace Apartment, Cotswold Cottage, Edinburgh Old Town Flat), 12 compliance records with mixed statuses (compliant, expiring_soon, overdue), 6 tasks with varied priorities
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 refactoring verification complete. Auth routes moved to /routes/auth.py, constants to /utils/constants.py, schemas to /models/schemas.py, database to /models/database.py, auth utils to /utils/auth.py, email service to /utils/email_service.py. All endpoints working correctly. Email sending MOCKED (RESEND_API_KEY not configured). AI assistant endpoints are /api/assistant/insights and /api/assistant/ask (not /query).

mocked_apis.email_notifications: Resend email service gracefully skipped when RESEND_API_KEY not configured
mocked_apis.password_reset_email: Returns success message but no actual email sent
